text: I always thought glass was made after a nuclear bomb test...

replies.text: Probably not the best way to make glass :)

replies.author: @lillyanneserrelio2187

author: @AutoNomades
text: Nice ! What would be very instructive now, is How insulated / double glazed panes are made.. Whats in the separating material, how they fill it with insulative gas, how to do it ourself... I'd love to do my own solar heater pipe/boxes/whatever container

replies.author: @dynomitejec
replies.text: Can't a solar heater be made without glass? I'm honestly not sure but I seem to think it's a thing... 🤔 I can't remember. Either way Robert should have a good video that explains them, I would assume he has at least.

replies.author: @AutoNomades
replies.text: @dynomitejecI was actually meaning to diy our own double pane glass solar heater...

replies.author: @dynomitejec
replies.text: Well I hope it works and that it doesnt cost you very much on materials. Nowadays I know wood has gotten outrageous I don't know about glass but I'd bet it isn't cheap either. Good luck 👍

replies.author: @AutoNomades
replies.text: @dynomitejecI mean using reclaimed glass, or glueing an aquarius into an other one, filling it with inert gas, to make a solar hoven for instance...

replies.author: @dynomitejec
replies.text: @AutoNomades  I didn't even think of aquariums being pre-made glass, just waiting to be used... sorry fish 🤣
